title: Garos IV
content:
{{Top|canon=Garos}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Garos_IV_FF19.jpg]] |name=Garos IV |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square P-7 in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian Borderlands]]. |sector=[[Msst sector/Legends|Msst sector]] |system=[[Garos system/Legends|Garos system]]{{JournalCite|1|A Glimmer of Hope}} |coordinates=P-7 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position=4 |moons=2''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' |routes= |lengthday=25 [[Standard hour/Legends|standard hours]] |lengthyear=382 [[Local day/Legends|local days]] |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Atmosphere/Legends#Type I|Type I]] {{C|breathable}} |climate=[[Temperature/Legends|Temperate]] |gravity=[[Gravity/Legends|Standard]] |terrain=*[[Forest/Legends|Forest]] *[[Mountain/Legends|Mountains]] *[[Ocean/Legends|Seas]]''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *Valleys |water=Moderate |interest=*[[Currahen Crossroad]]{{JournalCite|2|Whispers in the Dark}} *[[University of Garos]]{{JournalCite|5|Turning Point (Charlene Newcomb)}} *[[Tahika Cliffs]] |flora=[[Baraka tree]] |fauna=[[Boetay]] |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |socialgroup= |language=[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]] |government=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] {{C|[[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]] - [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]}} |population=*22 million {{C|[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]}}{{HoloNetNewsWeb|52|regional/13418_1.html|Mid Rim Worlds Open Ports to Refugees}} *24 million {{C|[[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]]}} |demonym=Garosian |cities=*[[Ariana]] {{C|[[Capital/Legends|capital]]}} *[[Garan]] *[[Zila]] *[[Northlan]] |imports=High technology |exports=*[[Foodstuff/Legends|Foodstuffs]] *Metals *[[Mineral/Legends|Minerals]] **[[Hibridium/Legends|Hibridium]] |affiliation=*[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]''[[The Clone Wars: Wild Space]]'' *Galactic Empire *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'' *[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' }} '''Garos IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], the fourth world in the [[Garos system/Legends|Garos system]]. Located near the [[Nyarikan Nebula/Legends|Nyarikan Nebula]], it was somewhat isolated from outside contact and its inhabitants were a tough, self-reliant people. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Officer/Legends|officers]] [[Brenn Tantor|Brenn]] and [[Dellis Tantor]],''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' and the adopted homeworld of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Alexandra Winger]]. In the [[Post-Imperial era/Legends|Post-Imperial era]], the planet was best known for the [[University of Garos]], whose database of secret [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] files were available for academic study. ==Description== [[File:GarosIV.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Garos IV.]] Orbited by two moons, Garos IV was a pleasant world of forests, mountains and oceans. Its population was concentrated on a single continent in three major centers: the waterfront resort town [[Zila]], located on the shores of the [[Locura Ocean]]; the manufacturing seat and agricultural breadbasket [[Garan]], situated on the [[Salc River]], near the [[Morcur Valley]]; and the capital city [[Ariana]]. South of the capital lay the [[Tahika Cliffs]], an impressive mountain range from which the Locura Ocean could be seen. The [[Old Currahen Highway]] connected Ariana and Garan. An Imperial [[mining center complex]] was established at [[Mount Usca]], which lay on a cape where the Locura Ocean and [[Cabalia Sea]] met and could be accessed via the [[Currahen Crossroad]]. The planet's spaceport lay on the outskirts of Ariana. Garos IV was largely self-sufficient, so fluctuations in the economy of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] did not have much impact on it. ==History== In approximately [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]], Garos IV was colonized by [[Human/Legends|Humans]]. At an unknown date, colonists from the neighboring planet of [[Sundari (planet)|Sundari]] began migrating en masse to Garos IV. Tensions grew between the Garosians and the Sundari until [[War between Garos 4 and Sundari|war]] later erupted between the two worlds. The conflict raged for generations, with at least [[Sundari–Garos Accord|one intermission]].{{TORcite|exp=shadow|type=crewskill|Diplomacy|The Sundari-Garos Accord}} By [[87 BBY/Legends|87 BBY]], the conflict had recommenced. Sometime between 46 BBY and 44 BBY, the Garosians first began to enter the service of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Garos IV allowed [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Relief Movement]] settlement in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], shortly before the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]. Garos IV was the site of a [[Battle at Garos IV|victory]] for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] over the Republic during the early stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The planet was in Separatist space until an unknown point before the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. Sometime before [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]], Garosian politician [[Tork Winger]] and Sundari engineer [[Tionthes Turi]] negotiated a truce between the warring factions of the [[Garosian civil war]]. Even as peace negotiations began, violations of the truce took place, including the [[Whahalla Massacre]] and the assassination of peace advocate [[West Haslip]] and [[Nieka Haslip|his wife]]. By [[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]], the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] began to take a greater interest in the Garos system. The Empire quickly put an end to the conflict, executing hundreds of activists on both sides. Once peace had been enforced, Winger was appointed as the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the planet. Most of the Imperial forces later left Garos IV, with the chief Imperial presence maintained at a [[Imperial Headquarters (Garos IV)|garrison]] and a [[mining center complex]] on the western shoreline of the main continent dedicated to mining [[Hibridium/Legends|hibridium]]. The hibridium mined from Garos IV was used in the development of new [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking devices]].
[[File:Alex_ATST.jpg|thumb|200px|Garosian resistance destroys an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]].]]
After the planet's subjugation, an insurgency, the [[Committee of Seven for Garosian Unification]], had emerged on Garos IV. The [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] caused the Garosian resistance to believe they would soon be rid of the Empire, but the Imperial forces instead stepped up their efforts to quarry the planet's hibridium. Taking advantage of support from [[Alexandra Winger]], the adopted daughter of the Imperial Governor, the resistance undertook a number of actions against the Imperial garrison, including ambushes on hibridium convoys and attacks aimed at the Imperial mining facility. During a rescue [[Mission to Sarahwiee|operation]] to [[Sarahwiee]] following the [[Thrawn campaign]], Alexandra Winger met [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who alerted the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to the planet's situation. The New Republic subsequently sent a fleet to liberate Garos IV. Aware of the impending invasion, the Empire sent [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Jaalib Brandl]] to evacuate Imperial dignitaries.{{JournalCite|12|Betrayal by Knight}} In the [[Battle of Garos|subsequent battle]], the Garosian resistance supported the New Republic. The planet itself suffered little damage in the brief conflict. Garos IV joined the New Republic after the battle. The Imperial forces that evacuated the world failed to destroy numerous classified documents. These files were maintained by the [[University of Garos]]. Scholars used the secret Imperial files to complete studies on the Empire. The influx of scholars increased the school's reputation and prompted the university to expand. An economic boom followed, while Garos IV appeared on numerous lists of desirable planets to live on. Sometime between [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] and [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of the Garos system|conquered]] the world during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion of the galaxy]]. By [[137 ABY]], Garos IV was within space controlled by [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]]. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Garos IV}} *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of
